meaning: n.监视者,监督者adj.监视的,监督的
examples: Methods Epidemiological methods was used to analyze the surveillant data of injury death from 1996 to 2000.
Objective To study the health state of workers exposed to tetraethyl lead petrol, and to find a surveillant index for them.
Conclusions it is urgent to increase vaccination quality, improve inoculation rate and establish surveillant system of measles.
